microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery **validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing data pipelines and workflows to sustain 45+ annual drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining product requirements, metric definitions, and self-service scheduling that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous validation methodology.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud** network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring rigorous data quality guardrails.

Built an internal **AI agent** restructuring drill-planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly analogous to LLM-powered product intelligence systems.

Owned incident management and data quality processes for upstream source disruptions across partner integrations, coordinating triage with Data Engineering to ensure **methodologically sound** outputs reached downstream stakeholders.

Defined cross-dataset standards and documentation libraries for AI-driven product behavior, encoding dataset limitations and edge cases to prevent over-interpretation and ensure **statistically defensible** conclusions at scale.
microsoft_2023: Championed AI-driven **code generation** adoption by conducting user demos and training across 14 key Azure teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and expanding the range of questions the product could answer confidently.

Shaped the product roadmap toward intent-based **YAML generation** by facilitating 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical methodology gaps and translating customer needs into scalable product capabilities.

Improved **data quality** and retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and enabling accurate, explainable answers at scale.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ teams with disparate data sources and dependencies.

Designed a product strategy to eliminate operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a roadmap to automate critical data pipelines.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact use cases, and make data-driven roadmap decisions with clear metric definitions.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping data dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and owning end-to-end data quality validation before production.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across cross-functional engineering stakeholders.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing methodology-breaking schema changes reaching production.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing operations and managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, building a CRM data model with clear field definitions and documented business logic.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy, optimizing digital channels using behavioral segmentation and cohort-level performance analysis.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks through cross-dataset insights and translating findings into repeatable, scalable pricing methodology.
